infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Vaultora needs access to your photo library to import media into your vault.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Vaultora needs permission to save media back to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Vaultora needs camera access to take photos directly into your vault.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Vaultora uses Face ID to quickly unlock your vault without entering your PIN.

plugins.photosPermission: Vaultora needs access to your photos to import them into your vault.
plugins.cameraPermission: Vaultora needs camera access to take photos directly into your vault.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Vaultora uses Face ID to unlock your vault.
